response.justification: Bogdan has extensive experience in software development and leadership roles, but his background is heavily skewed toward web, mobile, and scripting languages (TypeScript, Node.js, React, JavaScript) with limited recent C++ exposure. While he has prior C/C++ experience (e.g., National Instruments), it does not align closely with the industrial automation and cybersecurity (IEC 62443) requirements. His strengths in full-stack development and architectural design are valuable, but the lack of deep C++ and industrial systems expertise raises concerns for this role.
strengths: Strong full-stack development skills with experience in scalable, distributed systems
Proven leadership in agile methodologies, TDD, and code quality practices
Diverse technical background with exposure to IoT, embedded systems, and cybersecurity (SDL principles)
concerns: Limited recent C++ experience, particularly in high-performance or industrial automation contexts
No clear evidence of familiarity with industrial cybersecurity standards (IEC 62443) or message brokers (e.g., MQTT)
Lacks direct experience with industrial automation protocols (Modbus, OPC UA, etc.) or cloud platforms (Azure)
